Counci", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "As defined in the DSA, \u201c\u2018illegal content\u2019 means any information that . . . is not in compliance with Union law or the law of any Member Stat...", "direct_quote": "As defined in the DSA, \u201c\u2018illegal content\u2019 means any information that . . . is not in compliance with Union law or the law of any Member State . . . irrespective of the precise subject matter or nature of that law. . . .\u201d Id. art. 3(h).", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}], "evidence_summary": "Auto-extracted 3 facts."}]}
